svg.title: EU AI Act obligations mapped to agile delivery artifacts
svg.desc: Nine EU AI Act obligations — Articles 4, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 17, Annex IV, and post-market monitoring — each connected through a technical bridge to a corresponding agile delivery artifact.

g.text: EU AI Act → agile delivery artifact mapping

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Article 4 AI literacy require and how does it apply?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI literacy training epic work in SAFe PI planning?')
sendPrompt('What does Article 9 risk management require in the EU AI Act?')
sendPrompt('How does a risk backlog item work as an acceptance criterion?')
sendPrompt('What does Article 10 data governance require?')
sendPrompt('How does data lineage get enforced in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does Article 12 logging and record-keeping require?')
sendPrompt('How is an automated audit trail implemented in practice?')
sendPrompt('What does Article 13 transparency to users require?')
sendPrompt('How do teams implement AI disclosure as a user story?')
sendPrompt('What does Article 14 human oversight require for high-risk AI?')
sendPrompt('How is a human override checkpoint built into the Definition of Done?')
sendPrompt('What is the quality management system requirement under Article 17?')
sendPrompt('How does ISO 42001 serve as a QMS backbone for AI delivery?')
sendPrompt('What records does Annex IV technical documentation require?')
sendPrompt('How does living documentation work in an agile delivery model?')
sendPrompt('What does post-market monitoring require under the EU AI Act?')
sendPrompt('What does real-time drift detection and red-teaming look like in practice?')
